title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 279 至 575 行，共 1250 行) ---
 279 |     async def _compress_with_llm(
 280 |         self,
 281 |         messages: List[Dict[str, Any]],
 282 |         llm_summarizer_func: Optional[Callable],
 283 |         existing_summary: str,
 284 |         min_keep: int
 285 |     ) -> CompressionResult:
 286 |         """
 287 |         使用 LLM 生成摘要（当前策略）
 288 | 
 289 |         🔥 Phase 2 优化：
 290 |         - 添加缓存机制（避免重复调用）
 291 |         - 添加频率限制（每小时最多 10 次）
 292 |         - 超限时降级到 SLIDING_WINDOW
 293 | 
 294 |         Args:
 295 |             messages: 消息列表
 296 |             llm_summarizer_func: LLM 摘要函数
 297 |             existing_summary: 已有的摘要
 298 |             min_keep: 最少保留的消息数量
 299 | 
 300 |         Returns:
 301 |             CompressionResult
 302 |         """
 303 |         if not llm_summarizer_func:
 304 |             print("   [警告] LLM_SUMMARY 策略需要 llm_summarizer_func，降级到 SLIDING_WINDOW")
 305 |             return self._compress_with_sliding_window(messages, 0.3, min_keep)
 306 | 
 307 |         # 划分消息：最近完整 turn 原样保留，较旧完整 turn 作为摘要候选。
 308 |         keep_messages = self._select_recent_complete_turn_messages(messages, min_keep)
 309 |         keep_start = len(messages)
 310 |         if keep_messages:
 311 |             keep_start = min(
 312 |                 messages.index(msg)
 313 |                 for msg in keep_messages
 314 |                 if msg in messages
 315 |             )
 316 |         to_summarize = self._select_summary_candidate_messages(messages[:keep_start])
 317 |         builder = TurnBuilder()
 318 |         safe_turns = builder.complete_turns_only(builder.build(messages))
 319 |         summarized_turns = builder.complete_turns_only(builder.build(to_summarize))
 320 |         keep_turn_ids = {turn.id for turn in builder.complete_turns_only(builder.build(keep_messages))}
 321 |         dropped_turns = [turn for turn in safe_turns if turn.id not in keep_turn_ids and all(turn.id != st.id for st in summarized_turns)]
 322 |         compressed_state = self._extract_compressed_state(safe_turns, dropped_turns)
 323 | 
 324 |         # 🔥 Phase 2: 检查缓存
 325 |         messages_hash = self._get_messages_hash(to_summarize)
 326 |         if messages_hash in self.summary_cache:
 327 |             print(f"   ✅ 命中缓存：直接使用已有摘要")
 328 |             cached_summary = self.summary_cache[messages_hash]
 329 |             return CompressionResult(
 330 |                 success=True,
 331 |                 strategy=CompressionStrategy.LLM_SUMMARY,
 332 |                 compressed_messages=keep_messages,
 333 |                 summary=cached_summary,
 334 |                 compression_ratio=len(keep_messages) / len(messages) if messages else 0,
 335 |                 original_count=len(messages),
 336 |                 compressed_count=len(keep_messages),
 337 |                 metadata={
 338 |                     "from_cache": True,
 339 |                     "cache_hit": messages_hash,
 340 |                     "compressed_state": compressed_state.to_dict(),
 341 |                     "compressed_state_prompt": compressed_state.render_for_prompt(),
 342 |                 },
 343 |                 compressed_state=compressed_state
 344 |             )
 345 | 
 346 |         # 🔥 Phase 2: 检查频率限制
 347 |         if not self._should_call_llm():
 348 |             print(f"   ⚠️  LLM 调用超限，降级到 SLIDING_WINDOW")
 349 |             return self._compress_with_sliding_window(messages, 0.3, min_keep)
 350 | 
 351 |         # 生成摘要
 352 |         prompt = SUMMARY_PROMPT_TEMPLATE_V2.format(
 353 |             existing_summary=existing_summary or "无",
 354 |             messages_to_summarize=str(to_summarize)
 355 |         )
 356 | 
 357 |         try:
 358 |             summary_text = await llm_summarizer_func(prompt)
 359 | 
 360 |             # 🔥 Phase 2: 记录调用
 361 |             self._record_llm_call()
 362 | 
 363 |             if not summary_text:
 364 |                 return CompressionResu...
